description: Edge case EC-013 specifies tag chip overflow behavior: 'flex-wrap: wrap' and individual chips truncated at max-width 160px with ellipsis. There is no corresponding PROP in verification-architecture.md that verifies this visual overflow behavior. The existing PROP-TAG-001 only covers DOM structure (span.tag-chip with remove button and aria-label), not overflow/truncation/wrapping behavior. Responsive overflow handling is a common source of visual regressions.

evidence.snippet: EC-013 | Feed row with many tags (overflow) | Tag chips wrap to multiple lines (`flex-wrap: wrap`). Individual chips truncated at max-width 160px with ellipsis.
